title: Daragi Hoba

{{Quote|Ando will now determine her own future. It is meant to be, given the rampant hypocrisy of Palpatine's Republic. The current dispute over the creation of a Republic army is just another in a long line of insults to the Aqualish people.|Daragi Hoba|<ref name="HNN45" />}}
'''Daragi Hoba''' was the [[First Minister (Ando)|First Minister]] of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] who led his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] during its secession from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:2:28]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|broke out]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on 13:5:21.<ref name="Date">{{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}}</ref>

A member of the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Species/Legends|species]], Hoba addressed his fellow Andoans on the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] of Ando and the world [[Sy Myrth/Legends|Sy Myrth's]] joint official [[Secession of Ando|secession]] from the Republic on the [[Local day/Legends|morning]] of 13:2:28; as anti-Republic crowds formed of Aqualish from various places and walks of life gathered to celebrate in the [[Raquish Thoroughfare]] of Ando's [[Quantill City]] less than two [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] after the event, praising [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Po Nudo/Legends|Po Nudo]] of Ando<ref name="HNN45" />—whose position Hoba supported<ref name="CSWE" />—and destroying effigies of [[Senate Guard/Legends|Republic Senate Guards]], the First Minister proudly expressed<ref name="HNN45" /> his<ref name="CSWE" /> championing of Ando's self-determination and departure from the Republic via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] broadcast. He criticized the "rampant hypocrisy" of the Republic under<ref name="HNN45" /> [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], whose [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] debated the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|creation]] of a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|state army]]<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref> even though they had long forced the demilitarization of the Andoan people, which resulted in bloody conflicts such as the [[Battle of Raquish]] and the [[Horos Spine Incident]]. The [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] ran an article on the same day about Ando's secession, reporting on First Minister Hoba's statements.<ref name="HNN45" />

==Behind the scenes==
Daragi Hoba was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']].
